Submitted final result text:
FINAL_ANSWER: Use Disjoint Set Union (DSU) to maintain connectivity constraints, implement degree-plus-distance heuristics for initial placement, and apply Simulated Annealing with cluster-based moves to optimize the layout.
JUSTIFICATION: This approach ensures all color-adjacency relations are preserved via DSU, uses heuristics to minimize the footprint of connected components, and employs Simulated Annealing to escape local optima and maximize the number of empty cells (E).
